note: run_design only applies changes to API parameters (floor type, material, loads, sizing strategy, etc.). Geometric changes — column positions, bay dimensions, story heights, setbacks — must be made in Grasshopper.
message: This recommendation requires changing the building geometry in Grasshopper. The following are geometry properties, not API parameters: bay_width, story_height. Adjust the Rhino model or the GeometryInput component, then re-run the design from Grasshopper.
